agenda.title: Agenda
agenda.description: Plan the event schedule. Each date is its own table; agenda items sort automatically by their start time.
agenda.publishErrorDescription: Your local changes are still available. Try again.
agenda.duplicateDates: Two tables share the same date
agenda.duplicateDatesDescription: Change or remove one of the duplicated dates before publishing.
agenda.translationPriority: Showing items missing a translation first.
agenda.noDatesDescription: Add a date to start building the schedule. Each date gets its own table of agenda items.

dateModal.editDescription: Pick a new day for this table. Dates already in the agenda are disabled — each date can be used once.
dateModal.addDescription: Pick a day to add to the schedule. Dates already in the agenda are disabled — each date can be added once.

itemModal.description: A scheduled entry shown under this date on the public agenda.
itemModal.title: Title
itemModal.endTimeHint: Leave the end time blank for a single moment.

actions.discardDescription: This reverts this page to the last published version. Every edit, addition, reorder, and pending removal made since then will be lost. This cannot be undone.
actions.missingLanguageTitle: Some content is missing a language
actions.missingLanguageDescription: {count, plural, one {# item has} other {# items have}} content in only one language (English or Italian). You can fix the missing translations first, or publish anyway and complete them later.
actions.publishDescription: This makes your changes live on the website.

table.title: Title
table.removeItemDescription: This item will be marked for removal. You can restore it before publishing.
table.removeDateDescription: The date and all its agenda items will be marked for removal and disappear from the website when you publish. You can restore it until then.
table.empty: No agenda items yet. Use “Add agenda” to add the first one.

validation.italianTitle: Add the Italian title, or clear Italian from every field.
validation.italianLocation: Add the Italian location, or clear Italian from every field.
validation.endBeforeStart: End time cannot be earlier than start time.

review.title: Car submission review
review.notFound: This submission could not be found.
review.name: Name
review.internalCommentsDescription: Private notes for the review team. Never shown publicly.
review.internalCommentsPlaceholder: Add a note for the team...
review.decisionDescription: Change the status to move this submission through the workflow. Changes save immediately.
review.messagesDescription: Each message is emailed to the owner with a link to their pre-filled form.
review.messagePlaceholder: Explain what's missing or needs clarifying — e.g. “Please upload a clear front-view photo showing the number plate and attach the restoration records.”
review.movedOutOfQueue: The car has moved out of the submissions queue.
review.requestAdded: The request has been added to the owner message log.
review.savedEmailFailed: Submission saved, but email was not sent
review.retryNotification: The status is updated. Please retry the notification.
review.saveErrorDescription: Your changes are still on screen. Try again.
review.oneLanguageDescription: You can complete the missing translation before approval, or save it and return later.
review.saveDescription: Your changes to this submission will be saved and take effect right away.
review.discardDescription: You’ve edited this submission but haven’t saved yet. If you leave now, these changes will be lost.

imageManager.description: The first image is the cover. Supporting images can be reordered.
imageManager.reorderDescription: Drag supporting images to reorder, or use the menu to preview, promote, or remove.
imageManager.requirements: {count} of {minimum}-{maximum} images. JPG or PNG, maximum 10MB each.
imageManager.reorderImage: Drag to reorder supporting image of {name}
imageManager.saveOrder: Save the submission to keep this order.
imageManager.maximumImages: A car can have at most {count} images.
imageManager.addedDescription: {count, plural, one {# preview added} other {# previews added}} to the draft.
imageManager.filesSkipped: {count, plural, one {# file skipped} other {# files skipped}}
imageManager.fileRequirements: Use JPG or PNG files up to 10MB each.
imageManager.duplicatesSkipped: {count, plural, one {# duplicate file skipped} other {# duplicate files skipped}}

list.title: Car Submissions
list.description: Review incoming car submissions and move each one through the selection workflow. Review changes take effect when saved.
list.accepting: The public submission form is live and accepting cars.
list.notAccepting: The form is hidden and the website displays a closed message.
list.empty: No submissions match the current filters.
list.openDescription: The public submission form will become available immediately.
list.closeDescription: The public form will be replaced with a submissions-closed message.
list.clearDescription: Matching submissions will move to Delete history. You can restore them later.
list.clearSuccess: {count, plural, one {# submission cleared} other {# submissions cleared}}
list.clearSuccessDescription: All car submissions moved to the delete history. You can restore them from there.
list.clearConfirmDescription: This removes every car submission on this page. Cleared items move to the delete history, where they can be restored.
list.deleteHistoryDescription: Cleared car submissions. Restore any one to move it back onto the Submissions page.
list.restoreDescription: This submission will move back onto the Submissions page.
list.restoreSuccessDescription: The submission is back on the Submissions page.

validation.year: Enter a valid 4-digit year of manufacture.
validation.documentType: Documents must be PDF, DOC, or DOCX files.
validation.documentSize: Documents must be no larger than 10MB each.
validation.documentLimit: You can upload at most 10 documents.
validation.imageLimit: A car can have at most 10 images.
validation.duplicateDocument: A file named "{name}" has already been added.
validation.englishHistory: Add the vehicle history in English.
validation.documentRequired: Add at least one supporting document.
validation.messageRequired: Write a message telling the owner what's needed.

menu.logoutDescription: You will be signed out and returned to the login page.
